Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807.Problem

Packages that use Problem
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807
Juneau @Marshalled beans for RFC 7807 — Problem Details for HTTP APIs (media type application/problem+json).
org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807.adapter
Adapters that build Problem beans from Juneau HTTP error types.

    Problem.fromStatus(int status, String title, String detail)
    Convenience factory for the common "build a problem from a status code + title + detail" call site.

    Returns the wrapped Problem payload.
    Problem

    Translates the supplied Problem for the given Locale.

    Maps the supplied exception to a Problem bean.

    ProblemAdapters.fromException(BasicHttpException e)
